carriedBehavior: Canonical marketplace source parsing, staging, validation, atomic activation, persistent indexing, plugin lookup, and safe removal live under runtime/src/plugins/marketplace.
CLI and PluginInstallationManager marketplace methods call the canonical PK-07 layer directly.

Marketplace manager helpers cover config persistence, source registration/removal, cache refresh, plugin lookup, auto-update flags, policy allow/block matching, graceful loading degradation, and empty-state reason selection.
Remote marketplace helpers cover authenticated listing, installed-plugin listing, detail and skill fetches, install/uninstall mutations, and local cache cleanup.

Remote bundle helpers validate release metadata, require HTTPS or explicit loopback HTTP, cap download/extracted sizes, reject path traversal and link entries, verify extracted plugin manifest identity, and activate versioned cache installs atomically.

Startup sync helpers refresh curated marketplace snapshots through git first, then HTTP zipball, then backup archive, gate one-shot remote plugin reconciliation on local curated prerequisites, recover stale locks, and degrade to existing validated snapshots when refresh fails.

Marketplace fetch guards centralize HTTPS/loopback policy, bounded response reads, and credential-redacted URL error reporting for URL manifests, remote API JSON, remote bundles, and startup metadata.
intentionalReductions: Auth token vending remains outside PK-07; remote functions require caller-provided RemoteAuth headers and do not read API key environment variables directly.
Signed bundle verification is not invented in this row. PK-07 implements transport, path, and size safety, leaving signature policy to the later plugin security row.
Dependency solving, plugin demotion, and managed update orchestration are documented from inspected donors but are not wired into install/update decisions here.
UI refresh notification rendering and marketplace-specific TUI status transitions are reduced to runtime entry points that later UI rows can call.
The donor GCS mirror path is reduced to AgenC-owned agenc.tech startup HTTP and backup archive fallbacks; no donor bucket or donor product domain is retained.
Already-merged PK-06 CLI marketplace modules are not deleted. Live callers import the canonical PK-07 layer directly and no compatibility wrapper is added.

commands: npm exec --workspace=@tetsuo-ai/runtime vitest run src/plugins/marketplace src/plugins/cli/pluginCliCommands.test.ts
evidence: runtime/src/plugins/marketplace/ contains counterparts for every PK-07 named donor file.

runtime/src/types/upstream-ambient.d.ts is a narrow type-only contract for inherited upstream-mirror imports that are already in the tsc graph; it defines the specific shapes needed here without adding runtime compatibility exports or widening the typecheck baseline.

runtime/src/agenc/upstream/utils/protectedNamespace.ts now exports the helper name its existing caller already uses, removing the inherited typecheck/runtime mismatch without adding upstream mirror lines.
